name: THE BLEACH UNIVERSE (RPG)
description:
TO MY 7 FOLLOWERS I AM BACK!!

BLEACH RPG

=====================

"Yokoso Watashi No AI Society!"

Idk, I decided to create a rpg AI today cuz I'm bored tbh and also there's so many Bleach rpg's that are bad tbh no offense so i guess i was inspired to make a one (it would probably be equally as bad as the others) also disclaimer I couldn't put merely "all" characters in the description, I just put the main characters, some important captains and Yhwach and Aizen, I will try to return to listing more characters later
creator: JujuXGamer69
